commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `syntheticOnly` and `protectMain` session-cleanup controls across the CLI, gateway protocol, cleanup runtime, generated Swift model, tests, and documentation.

PR surface: Source +317, Tests +261, Docs +56, Other +8. Total +642 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main applies all cleanup stages without a synthetic-only policy preserve set, and the PR provides a concrete real-CLI dry-run demonstrating the guarded behavior. I did not run an additional destructive apply reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers should decide whether the two new independently composable destructive-cleanup controls are the intended permanent CLI and gateway API; no concrete patch defect requires an automated repair.
